vllm.title: Delay GPU->CPU sync in sampling
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR preallocates tensors used to prune hidden states and to index the samples by sampling type allowing us to delay the GPU->CPU sync slightly longer (up until torch.multinomial in the sampler).
Should fix the slight performance regression introduced in #1309
Technically, we can delay the sync e

vllm.title: Refactor LLMEngine demo script for clarity and modularity
vllm.author: iongpt
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Broke down the main function into modular sub-functions.
Separated prompt creation into its own function for easier management.
Introduced dedicated function for continuous request processing.
Streamlined engine initialization from CLI arguments.
Improved main loop readability and management in proc

vllm.title: Fix logging issues
vllm.author: Tostino
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, info logs are not actually being logged.
For example the args log in the OpenAI api_server:
logger.info(f"args: {args}")

doesn't actually print anything when you start the server.
This pull request fixes that.

vllm.title: Add py.typed so consumers of vLLM can get type checking
vllm.author: jroesch
vllm.bodyExcerpt: See https://blog.whtsky.me/tech/2021/dont-forget-py.typed-for-your-typed-python-package/ and https://mypy.readthedocs.io/en/stable/installed_packages.html#installed-packages. Enables vLLM types to be used by MyPy in code which depends on vLLM.

vllm.title: vLLM always places spaces between special tokens
vllm.author: blahblahasdf
